title: olyra latifolia var. glabriuscula
intro: Olyra latifolia var. glabriuscula, also known as the lesser olyra or lesser oaten grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Olyra latifolia var. glabriuscula include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having potential effects on digestive issues and fever reduction. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
